allow: PowerShell($json = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://go.dev/dl/?mode=json" -UseBasicParsing; $latest = $json[0]; $latest.version; \($latest.files | Where-Object { $_.os -eq "windows" -and $_.arch -eq "amd64" -and $_.kind -eq "installer" }\) | Format-List filename, size, sha256)

PowerShell($url = "https://go.dev/dl/go1.26.2.windows-amd64.msi"; $dst = "$env:USERPROFILE\\Downloads\\go1.26.2.windows-amd64.msi"; $expectedSha = "84826eca833548bb2beabe7429052eaaec18faa902fde723898d906b42e59a73"; $ProgressPreference = "SilentlyContinue"; Write-Output "Downloading to: $dst"; $sw = [System.Diagnostics.Stopwatch]::StartNew\(\); Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile $dst -UseBasicParsing; $sw.Stop\(\); $size = \(Get-Item $dst\).Length; Write-Output \("Done in {0:N1}s, size={1:N0} bytes \({2:N2} MB\)" -f $sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds, $size, \($size/1MB\)\); $actualSha = \(Get-FileHash -Path $dst -Algorithm SHA256\).Hash.ToLower\(\); if \($actualSha -eq $expectedSha\) { Write-Output "SHA256 OK: $actualSha" } else { Write-Output "SHA256 MISMATCH"; Write-Output "expected: $expectedSha"; Write-Output "actual:   $actualSha" })
